commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes session model override handling, status reporting, gateway sessions.patch behavior, docs, and tests so explicit configured-default model selections persist as user pins while default/null paths clear pins.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main clears `selection.isDefault` overrides, so an explicit configured-default choice cannot persist as `modelOverrideSource: "user"`. I did not run tests in this read-only review, but the PR body supplies after-fix terminal proof.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can restore the two current-main regressions without choosing the larger model-policy direction.

target.title: fix(sessions): honor explicit default model pins
target.body:
## Summary
- Persist explicit user selections of the configured default model as exact session model pins instead of clearing them as if they were unpinned defaults.
- Keep `/model default`, `session_status(model=default)`, and `sessions.patch model:null` as the explicit clear/unpin paths.
- Carry the exact selection through reply, queued-run, agent-command, reset, status, and sessions.patch paths so channel/parent/config fallback policy cannot silently replace user intent.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Explicit `/model <configured default>` selections no longer lose user intent just because they match the configured primary; fallback policy treats them as strict user session selections, while `/model default` still clears back to unpinned behavior.
Real environment tested: Local beatrice.local source checkout at PR head `0ba67184c403941421ac9e409b592829dd0c224c` on May 23, 2026. Built with `node scripts/build-all.mjs`, then ran a local behavior probe against the built `dist/` session/status modules. No channel credentials or provider API keys were used.
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `node scripts/build-all.mjs`
2. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/sessions/reset-preserved-selection.test.ts src/sessions/model-overrides.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.model.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run.media-only.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.fast-path.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-patch.test.ts src/commands/status.summary.test.ts src/status/status-message.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts`
3. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/sessions/model-overrides.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.model.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-patch.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.fast-path.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run.media-only.test.ts src/config/sessions/reset-preserved-selection.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts`
4. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/session-reset-model.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-models.test.ts src/commands/status.summary.test.ts`
5. Inline local behavior probe that imported the built `dist/model-overrides-*.js` and `dist/status-message-*.js` modules, applied an explicit configured-default selection, changed the configured default, rendered `/status`, then applied `/model default` and rendered `/status` again.
6. `git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD`
Evidence after fix:
Terminal transcript:
```text
$ local behavior probe: explicit /model <configured default> pin, config change, /status, /model default

Initial /status with config primary openai/gpt-5.5
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.5.22 (0ba6718)
🧠 Model: openai/gpt-5.5 · 🔑 api-key
📚 Context: 0/200k (0%) · 🧹 Compactions: 0
🧵 Session: agent:main:pr-85643-proof • updated 20597d ago
⚙️ Execution: direct · Runtime: OpenClaw Pi Default · Think: off · Text: low · elevated
🪢 Queue: collect (depth 0)

After explicit /model openai/gpt-5.5
{
  "providerOverride": "openai",
  "modelOverride": "gpt-5.5",
  "modelOverrideSource": "user"
}

/status after config primary changes to openai/gpt-5.4
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.5.22 (0ba6718)
🧠 Configured default: openai/gpt-5.4
📌 Session selected: openai/gpt-5.5 · 🔑 api-key
⚠️ Reason: session override
⚠️ This session is pinned to openai/gpt-5.5; config primary openai/gpt-5.4 will apply to new/unpinned sessions.
↩️ Clear with: /model default
📖 Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/models#selection-source-and-fallback-behavior
📚 Context: 0/200k (0%) · 🧹 Compactions: 0
🧵 Session: agent:main:pr-85643-proof • updated just now
⚙️ Execution: direct · Runtime: OpenClaw Pi Default · Think: off · Text: low · elevated
🪢 Queue: collect (depth 0)

After /model default
{}

/status after /model default with config primary openai/gpt-5.4
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.5.22 (0ba6718)
🧠 Model: openai/gpt-5.4 · 🔑 api-key
📚 Context: 0/200k (0%) · 🧹 Compactions: 0
🧵 Session: agent:main:pr-85643-proof • updated just now
⚙️ Execution: direct · Runtime: OpenClaw Pi Default · Think: off · Text: low · elevated
🪢 Queue: collect (depth 0)
```
Observed result after fix: The current PR head preserves an explicit configured-default selection as a user session pin, `/status` shows the pinned-session warning plus `Clear with: /model default` after the config primary changes, and `/model default` removes the persisted override so `/status` returns to the new configured primary.
What was not tested: No live Telegram/OpenAI provider turn was run, no real channel delivery was exercised, and no live runtime files or LaunchAgent state were modified.
target.author: latensified
